BeneficiaryParty.Description: Customer attempted to withdraw substantial funds from their account but request was denied due to system error.

SuspiciousActivity.Description: Customer attempted to withdraw funds, but the request was denied. This, combined with previous unusual transfers to GlobalTech Solutions Ltd, raises significant concerns about potential investment fraud.

SuspicionIndicators.Indicator: Investment in a largely unregulated sector
Customer appears to be persuaded to increase investment based on fabricated returns
Withdrawal request denial – possible attempt to prevent fund retrieval
